templates.name: 数据库备份
templates.description: 备份 MySQL/PostgreSQL 数据库并压缩
templates.content:
#!/bin/bash
# 数据库备份脚本
# 用法: 修改下面的变量后使用

DB_TYPE="mysql"  # mysql 或 postgres
DB_NAME="mydb"
DB_USER="root"
DB_PASS="password"
BACKUP_DIR="/opt/backups/db"
KEEP_DAYS=7

DATE=$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)
FILE="${BACKUP_DIR}/${DB_NAME}_${DATE}.sql.gz"

mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR"

if [ "$DB_TYPE" = "mysql" ]; then
  mysqldump -u"$DB_USER" -p"$DB_PASS" "$DB_NAME" | gzip > "$FILE"
elif [ "$DB_TYPE" = "postgres" ]; then
  PGPASSWORD="$DB_PASS" pg_dump -U "$DB_USER" "$DB_NAME" | gzip > "$FILE"
fi

# 清理旧备份
find "$BACKUP_DIR" -name "*.sql.gz" -mtime +$KEEP_DAYS -delete

echo "备份完成: $FILE"

templates.name: 网站文件备份
templates.content:
#!/bin/bash
# 网站文件备份脚本

WEB_DIR="/var/www/html"
BACKUP_DIR="/opt/backups/web"
KEEP_DAYS=7

DATE=$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)
FILE="${BACKUP_DIR}/web_${DATE}.tar.gz"

mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR"
tar -czf "$FILE" -C "$(dirname $WEB_DIR")" "$(basename $WEB_DIR")"

# 清理旧备份
find "$BACKUP_DIR" -name "web_*.tar.gz" -mtime +$KEEP_DAYS -delete

echo "备份完成: $FILE"

templates.name: 磁盘空间监控
templates.description: 检查磁盘使用率，超过阈值告警
templates.content:
#!/bin/bash
# 磁盘空间监控脚本

THRESHOLD=80
ALERT_EMAIL="admin@example.com"

while read line; do
  usage=$(echo "$line" | awk '{print $5}' | tr -d '%')
  mount=$(echo "$line" | awk '{print $6}')
  
  if [ "$usage" -gt "$THRESHOLD" ]; then
    msg="警告: $mount 使用率 ${usage}% 超过阈值 ${THRESHOLD}%"
    echo "$msg"
    # 发送告警（可选）
    # echo "$msg" | mail -s "磁盘告警" "$ALERT_EMAIL"
  fi
done < <(df -h | grep '^/dev/' | awk '$5 != "-"')

templates.name: 服务健康检查
templates.description: 检查服务是否运行，异常时自动重启
templates.content:
#!/bin/bash
# 服务健康检查脚本

SERVICE_NAME="nginx"
MAX_RETRIES=3

check_service() {
  systemctl is-active --quiet "$SERVICE_NAME"
}

if ! check_service; then
  echo "服务 $SERVICE_NAME 未运行，尝试重启..."
  
  for i in $(seq 1 $MAX_RETRIES); do
    systemctl restart "$SERVICE_NAME"
    sleep 2
    
    if check_service; then
      echo "服务重启成功 (第 $i 次尝试)"
      exit 0
    fi
  done
  
  echo "服务重启失败，已尝试 $MAX_RETRIES 次"
  exit 1
else
  echo "服务 $SERVICE_NAME 运行正常"
fi

templates.name: 日志清理
templates.content:
#!/bin/bash
# 日志清理脚本

LOG_DIRS=(
  "/var/log/nginx"
  "/var/log/apache2"
  "/opt/app/logs"
)
KEEP_DAYS=30
DRY_RUN=false

for dir in "${LOG_DIRS[@]}"; do
  if [ -d "$dir" ]; then
    echo "清理目录: $dir (保留 $KEEP_DAYS 天)"
    
    if [ "$DRY_RUN" = true ]; then
      find "$dir" -name "*.log" -mtime +$KEEP_DAYS -print
    else
      find "$dir" -name "*.log" -mtime +$KEEP_DAYS -delete
    fi
  fi
done

echo "日志清理完成"

templates.name: Git 拉取部署
templates.description: 从 Git 仓库拉取代码并部署
templates.content:
#!/bin/bash
# Git 拉取部署脚本

REPO_DIR="/opt/app"
BRANCH="main"

cd "$REPO_DIR" || exit 1

# 拉取最新代码
echo "拉取最新代码..."
git fetch origin
git checkout "$BRANCH"
git pull origin "$BRANCH"

# 安装依赖（根据项目类型调整）
if [ -f "package.json" ]; then
  echo "安装 Node.js 依赖..."
  npm install --production
  npm run build
elif [ -f "requirements.txt" ]; then
  echo "安装 Python 依赖..."
  pip install -r requirements.txt
elif [ -f "go.mod" ]; then
  echo "编译 Go 项目..."
  go build -o app .
fi

# 重启服务
echo "重启服务..."
systemctl restart app

echo "部署完成"

templates.name: Docker Compose 部署
templates.description: 使用 Docker Compose 部署应用
templates.content:
#!/bin/bash
# Docker Compose 部署脚本

PROJECT_DIR="/opt/app"
COMPOSE_FILE="docker-compose.yml"

cd "$PROJECT_DIR" || exit 1

# 拉取最新镜像
echo "拉取最新镜像..."
docker compose -f "$COMPOSE_FILE" pull

# 停止旧容器
echo "停止旧容器..."
docker compose -f "$COMPOSE_FILE" down

# 启动新容器
echo "启动新容器..."
docker compose -f "$COMPOSE_FILE" up -d

# 清理旧镜像
echo "清理旧镜像..."
docker image prune -f

echo "部署完成"

templates.name: SSH 登录告警
templates.description: 监控 SSH 登录失败，多次失败时告警
templates.content:
#!/bin/bash
# SSH 登录告警脚本

LOG_FILE="/var/log/auth.log"
MAX_FAILURES=5
TIME_WINDOW=300  # 5 分钟

# 统计最近失败次数
failures=$(journalctl -u sshd --since "-${TIME_WINDOW}s" | grep -c "Failed password")

if [ "$failures" -gt "$MAX_FAILURES" ]; then
  echo "警告: 最近 ${TIME_WINDOW} 秒内有 $failures 次 SSH 登录失败"
  
  # 获取失败的 IP
  journalctl -u sshd --since "-${TIME_WINDOW}s" | \
    grep "Failed password" | \
    grep -oP '\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+' | \
    sort | uniq -c | sort -rn
fi

templates.name: SSL 证书检查
templates.description: 检查 SSL 证书过期时间
templates.content:
#!/bin/bash
# SSL 证书检查脚本

DOMAINS=(
  "example.com"
  "api.example.com"
)
WARN_DAYS=30

for domain in "${DOMAINS[@]}"; do
  expiry=$(echo | openssl s_client -servername "$domain" -connect "$domain":443 2>/dev/null | \
    openssl x509 -noout -enddate 2>/dev/null | cut -d= -f2)
  
  if [ -n "$expiry" ]; then
    expiry_epoch=$(date -d "$expiry" +%s)
    now_epoch=$(date +%s)
    days_left=$(( (expiry_epoch - now_epoch) / 86400 ))
    
    if [ "$days_left" -lt "$WARN_DAYS" ]; then
      echo "警告: $domain 证书将在 $days_left 天后过期 ($expiry)"
    else
      echo "正常: $domain 证书还有 $days_left 天过期"
    fi
  else
    echo "错误: 无法获取 $domain 的证书信息"
  fi
done

templates.name: 系统清理
templates.description: 清理系统临时文件和缓存
templates.content:
#!/bin/bash
# 系统清理脚本

echo "开始系统清理..."

# 清理 apt 缓存
if command -v apt-get &> /dev/null; then
  echo "清理 apt 缓存..."
  apt-get autoremove -y
  apt-get clean
fi

# 清理临时文件
echo "清理临时文件..."
rm -rf /tmp/*
rm -rf /var/tmp/*

# 清理日志
echo "清理旧日志..."
journalctl --vacuum-time=7d

# 清理 Docker（如果安装）
if command -v docker &> /dev/null; then
  echo "清理 Docker..."
  docker system prune -f
fi

echo "系统清理完成"

templates.name: 系统信息收集
templates.description: 收集系统信息用于诊断
templates.content:
#!/bin/bash
# 系统信息收集脚本

echo "=== 系统信息 ==="
uname -a

echo -e "\n=== CPU 信息 ==="
lscpu | head -10

echo -e "\n=== 内存使用 ==="
free -h

echo -e "\n=== 磁盘使用 ==="
df -h | grep '^/'

echo -e "\n=== 网络接口 ==="
ip -4 addr show | grep inet

echo -e "\n=== 运行时间 ==="
uptime

echo -e "\n=== 最近登录 ==="
last -5

echo -e "\n=== 运行中的服务 ==="
systemctl list-units --type=service --state=running | head -20
